film.title: Girlfight
film.overview: Diana Guzman, a troubled Brooklyn teenager, decides to channel her aggression by training to become a boxer, all while keeping it a secret from her father.

dialogues.dialogue: Here, this is from my dad.  You Sandro's kid too?.  - How come I never heard aboutyou?. - I don't know. I'm his pride and joy.  Jesus Christ.  Nice meeting you.
